spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: Preset buttons, three labelled selects, editable previews, and copy action all update the live theme output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept lede keeps caret-shape as the main property while showing how it composes with color and valid caret-animation values.

edge_cases.rationale: The readout explicitly reports invalid caret-shape and caret-animation keywords as rejected.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664.

design_system.rationale: Raw color picker literals were replaced with shared-variable choices and local status classes.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked Minimal, Terminal, Notepad, IDE, and Retro presets, selected a custom underscore/blue/manual-blink theme, and clicked copy. Computed caret-shape returned bar/block/underscore/bar/block/underscore; caret-animation used auto or manual with CSS animation for blink, invalid blink was false, and console/network were clean.
